zh.lifeSummary: 當Aubert II de Longueval於1240年出生時，他的父親Guillaume de Longueval15歲，母親Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol15歲。他於大約1260年與Anne de Beaumont結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1285年9月在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aubert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was popular among the Normans, who introduced it to Britain, where it was later reinforced by settlers from the Low Countries. An 8th-century St Hubert succeeded St Lambert as bishop of Maastricht and is regarded as the patron of hunters, since, like St Eustace , he is supposed to have seen a vision of Christ crucified between the antlers of a stag.

en.lifeSummary: When Aubert II de Longueval was born in 1240, his father, Guillaume de Longueval, was 15 and his mother, Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol, was 15. He married Anne de Beaumont about 1260. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in September 1285, in Cotes, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aubert II de Longueval est né en 1240, son père, Guillaume de Longueval, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Anne de Beaumont environ 1260. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1285, à Cotes, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aubert II de Longueval 1240 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Longueval 15 und seine Mutter Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol 15. Er hat um 1260 Anne de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb im September 1285 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Cotes, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aubert II de Longueval è nato il nel 1240, il suo padre, Guillaume de Longueval, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Anne de Beaumont circa 1260. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1285, nel Cotes, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Aubert II de Longueval(이)가 1240년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Longueval(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 Anne de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1285년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aubert II de Longueval nasceu em 1240, seu pai, Guillaume de Longueval, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne de Beaumont aproximadamente 1260. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1285, em Cotes, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aubert II de Longueval родился в 1240 г., его отцу по имени Guillaume de Longueval было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine de Châtillon-Saint-Pol, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne de Beaumont около 1260 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1285 г. в местности котесь, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
